case_title: STACKWOOD,TERRANCE, D.C.DBA UNIVERSAL CHIROPRACTIC VS. RORY FELIX et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF STACKWOOD,TERRANCE, D.C.DBA UNIVERSAL CHIROPRACTIC AS TO DEFENDANT HERTZ CORPORATION (HERTZ RENT A CAR)
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO RORY FELIX BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAY-15-2008 AT 1:30PM.
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE CO. BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAY-15-2008 AT 1:30PM.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,095.00 FILED BY STACKWOOD,TERRANCE, D.C.DBA UNIVERSAL CHIROPRACTIC AS TO DEFENDANT FELIX, RORY HERTZ CORPORATION (HERTZ RENT A CAR) GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-15-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-15-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-15-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT RORY FELIX NOT PRESENT.(NOT SERVED). DEFENDANT GEICO NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT HERTZ PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STACKWOOD,TERRANCE, D.C.DBA UNIVERSAL CHIROPRACTIC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HERTZ CORPORATION (HERTZ RENT A CAR) DEFENDANT HERTZ CORPORATION DID NOT OWE ANY DUTY TO PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT RORY FELIX DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
